addressTooltip: Type an address and press Look up to see information about that location.
submitTooltip: Search for information about this address.
resultTemplate: Configure the result template in the widget settings. Use {FIELD_NAME} tokens to insert attributes from the selected layer.
noAddressMessage: We couldn't find that address. Please check the spelling and try again.
outsideAreaMessage: That address is outside the area covered by this lookup.
errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
